speaker: speaker1
text: May I help you with something ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I would like to return some books .

speaker: speaker1
text: These books were due two weeks ago .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah . I totally forgot they were due .

speaker: speaker1
text: You will need to pay late fees on these books .

speaker: speaker2
text: How much are the late fees ?

speaker: speaker1
text: The fee is 25 cents every day .

speaker: speaker2
text: I have to pay 25 cents a day ?

speaker: speaker1
text: And that ’ s for each book that is late .

speaker: speaker2
text: That shouldn ’ t be a problem .
